text:
In a vast, star-filled universe, there existed a planet named Aridix, orbiting an aging solitary sun. The surface of Aridix was arid and uninviting, as its single large ocean lay deep within a perpetually barren expanse interrupted only by the skeletal remains of ancient, dried-up river beds.

In this inhospitable world, humanity had long since become an enigma, their presence a whispered legend. The few who had managed to escape the planet returned in fragments, their science and culture twisted by time and an indomitable drive to survive against the odds.

Yet, amidst the desolation, there were stories. Stories told by the old ones who, through the centuries, had endured and banded together across the vast interstellar divide, sharing hope and wisdom through whispers that echoed through space.

The story of Zephyra, the Last Navigator, had been passed down through generations. Zephyra was the last human to have navigated Aridix's
